research.product: SAP S/4HANA Cloud — Business Partner (A2X) OData API

official_sources.title: SAP Business Accelerator Hub catalog record — Business Partner (A2X), API_BUSINESS_PARTNER 1.7.0
official_sources.used_for: current API version (1.7.0), ODATA service code, service URL .../sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER, A2X CRUD scope over Business Partner/Supplier/Customer, deep-entity and batch support statement, pointer to the Business Partner (A2X) help topic (loio 85043858ea0f9244e10000000a4450e5)

official_sources.title: URI Conventions (OData Version 2.0)
official_sources.used_for: $select/$filter/$expand/$orderby/$top/$skip/$inlinecount syntax; eq/and operators and single-quoted string literals; comma-separated $expand paths with slash nesting; $inlinecount=allpages semantics; %20 percent-encoding of spaces

official_sources.title: JSON Format (OData Version 2.0)
official_sources.used_for: d wrapper and results array; __count; __next partial-set link ('a URI which identifies the next partial set of entities'); __deferred representation of unexpanded navigation properties; inline expanded entries; /Date(ms)/ Edm.DateTime encoding

official_sources.title: Use the OData v2 Type-safe Client API | SAP Cloud SDK for Java (official SAP SDK docs)
official_sources.used_for: SAP OData V2 server-driven paging semantics (next links / $skiptoken indicate a further page; clients iterate until exhausted); SAP service error responses surfaced as ODataServiceErrorException with the OData error details preserved — grounding for preserving code/message/innererror verbatim

official_sources.title: Operations (OData Version 2.0)
official_sources.used_for: error conditions exposed as 4xx/5xx responses whose bodies carry detailed error information; response-code conventions for the protocol SAP Gateway implements

research.language_rationale: The master-data tooling this client joins is a Java service; SAP's own Java integration surface (SAP Cloud SDK) wraps exactly this OData V2 wire protocol, so implementing the documented protocol directly with java.net.http and a small parser is credible and keeps the hermetic seed dependency-free, while the Cloud SDK docs serve as SAP's normative description of pagination and error semantics.

verified_facts: API_BUSINESS_PARTNER is the Business Partner (A2X) OData service, current version 1.7.0, served under /sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER; it supports CRUD, deep entities, and $batch.
OData V2 collections arrive as d.results; $inlinecount=allpages yields a decimal-string __count; a __next link identifies the next partial result set and is followed as returned.

$select takes comma-separated property names; $filter uses eq/and with single-quoted string literals (embedded quotes doubled); $expand takes comma-separated navigation paths with slash nesting such as to_BusinessPartnerAddress.
Expanded collection navigation properties arrive inline wrapped in a results object; unexpanded ones arrive as __deferred objects whose uri is fetched verbatim.
Edm.DateTime values serialize as /Date(milliseconds since epoch)/.

SAP Gateway error responses carry an OData error document with code and message.value plus SAP's innererror block (application component, transactionid, errordetails) that must be preserved for support tickets.
The A2X variant is called with a communication user; every request — including next links and deferred URIs — carries the same authentication.
